title: Sun Fade
description: Fades the Sun and Moon away when they pass below the horizon, ideal for void worlds
body:
# Sun and Moon Fading
Ever played on a Skyblock and get annoyed by the Sun still being visible at the bottom of the world? This mod aims to fix that! After the Sun sets, it will slowly start to fade out, until it is no longer visible.

Same thing with the Moon

![A gif of the Sun and Moon setting on the horizon in a void world, both fading under the horizon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RonHzAvJ/images/88a726186671085ba4a2cc7b7b66be41fe12fbde.gif)

### Fully Customizable
This Mod aims to be compatible with all kinds of worlds and playstyles. 

Don't like the time the Sun fades? You change change that

Do you still want the Moon to be visible at all times? You can disable its fading

![Screenshot of the Config Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RonHzAvJ/images/4ce9aeb99fda90fef667135b04ccdb617660f6a6.jpeg)

### Compatibilites
**Current Incompatibilites:**
- `Unknown`
It's Likely that this mod will conflict with many Skybox mods, as they'd both be touching the same code. Let me know if you run into an incompatibility and I'll try to see about fixing it!

**Partial Incompatibility**
- `Iris Shaders`
While there's no errors, the shaders override any changes this mod implements! But if you are using shaders, there should be some that provide similar effects as this mod
